title: rubus hirtus var. pubescens
intro: Rubus hirtus var. pubescens, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. pubescens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, or consumed raw as a fruit to reap its nutritional benefits.
